title: cordia alnifolia
intro: Cordia alnifolia, also known as the White Glossy Leaf or also referred to as 'Borwah' or 'Wish Tree', is a species of flowering plant in the bignonia family. The Cordia alnifolia plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cordia alnifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and aid in the treatment of various skin conditions. The plant is often prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as used in traditional medicine in various forms, including powder, oil, and extracts.
